name: Cherry Tomato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and stem the tomatoes.
2. Dry the tomatoes completely.
3. Cook the bacon until it is very crisp; drain thoroughly on paper towels.
4. Mix together the mayonnaise, tarragon vinegar, olive oil, salt, and fresh basil in a bowl.
5. Pour the dressing over the tomatoes.
6. Crumble the cooked bacon over the salad.
7. Stir to coat the tomatoes with the dressing.
8. Serve on lettuce leaves.
9. Sprinkle with chives.
10. Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve.
